info.title: MDM Device Posture API
info.description: Canonical API contract for MDM  device posture system. This JSON spec covers agent ingestion, normalization, evaluation, scoring, decisioning, remediation, policy management, catalog, lookups, and admin jobs.

get.summary: Get latest decision for a device

parameters.name: os_name
parameters.description: Linux distro code. Used when os_type=LINUX.

get.summary: List remediation tasks for a device
